atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind v4. Defines design tokens (colors, fonts, spacing) that become CSS variables and generate utility classes. Use `@theme inline` when the values reference other CSS variables.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind v4. Registers a custom utility class that works with variants such as hover: and lg:.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind v4. Defines a custom variant. Used here to drive class-based dark mode from `.dark` on the html element.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind v4. Applies a Tailwind variant to styles in your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind. Inlines existing utility classes into custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind v4. Explicitly registers a source file or glob for class detection.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Tailwind v4. Loads a JavaScript plugin.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind v4. Loads a legacy JavaScript config file.

atDirectives.name: @reference
atDirectives.description: Tailwind v4. Imports theme tokens from another stylesheet without emitting its CSS.
